name: Montreal Wren Small Lamp Base Blush - Threshold™: Ceramic, No Assembly, ETL Listed
description:
Add a charming upgrade to any living space with the Montreal Wren Lamp base from Threshold™. This ceramic lamp base features a stylish vase design with light-blue glaze that brings a gentle charm to any room that you are sure to love. This light-blue lamp base works with standard, medium-screw lightbulbs so you never have to look far for the right bulbs.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
